description: User configuration for Follow Builders skill (Obsidian Edition). Stored at ~/.follow-builders/config.json

platform.description: Detected platform: qwen or other (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

language.description: Digest language: en (English), zh (Traditional Chinese), bilingual (both)

timezone.description: IANA timezone string for scheduling (e.g. America/New_York, Asia/Taipei)

frequency.description: How often to deliver the digest

deliveryTime.description: Time of day to deliver digest in HH:MM format (24-hour)

weeklyDay.description: Day of week for weekly digests (only used when frequency is weekly)

delivery.description: How the digest is delivered to the user

method.description: Delivery method: obsidian (Daily Note via Obsidian CLI), stdout (terminal/agent), telegram (bot message), email (via Resend)

vaultPath.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault (only for obsidian method)

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID (only for telegram method)

email.description: Email address to send digest to (only for email method)

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user has completed initial setup
